# Backend

The `lmlib.statespace.backend` module enables Just-in-Time (JIT) compilation (via the `numba` package) for time-critical routines, which significantly speeds up filtering applications. The examples below demonstrate its usage.

<!-- gen-gallery:skip-run
# Single source of truth for examples whose figures must NOT be regenerated by
# the automated gallery build (docs/scripts_docs/create_gallery.py). That build
# runs on a GitHub Actions box with no GPU and limited CPU, so these examples are
